title: Rich Springy French Pinto Bean Eclair
description: Indulgent French dish featuring pinto beans, steamed to perfection and wrapped in pandan leaves, with a rich and springy texture, inspired by the Mediterranean flavors of Provence. This eclair is a unique and delicious twist on traditional French cuisine.
instructions: Rinse the dried pinto beans and soak them in water for at least 8 hours.
Drain and rinse the soaked pinto beans, then transfer them to a steamer basket.
Steam the pinto beans over boiling water for 20 minutes, or until they are tender.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the minced garlic until fragrant.
Add the lemon juice, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, mash the steamed pinto beans using a fork or a potato masher.
Add the sauteed garlic mixture and shredded gruyere cheese to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Lay a pandan leaf flat on a work surface and place a small amount of the pinto bean mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the pandan leaf over the filling to form a triangle or a square shape, and press the edges to seal.
Repeat with the remaining pandan leaves and pinto bean mixture.
Serve the eclairs warm, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
